description: The Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) describes the procedures for animal handling and monitoring, anesthesia, daily MRI QC/QA, and MRI sequences for single and multi-mouse imaging for detection and monitoring of tumors and metastatic lesions. This SOP is used/performed by the Small Animal Imaging Program (SAIP) at NCI-Frederick, Frederick National Laboratory for Cancer Research.
download_title: Standard Operating Procedure 50101 handling and imaging protocol
raw_json:
{"collection status":"Complete","data type":["Protocol"],"date updated":"2024-04-30","description":"

The Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) describes the procedures for animal handling and
monitoring, anesthesia, daily MRI QC/QA, and MRI sequences for single and multi-mouse
imaging for detection and monitoring of tumors and metastatic lesions. This SOP is
used/performed by the Small Animal Imaging Program (SAIP) at NCI-Frederick, Frederick
National Laboratory for Cancer Research.
